-- 27 of 268 --

The Fitness Industry Has Evolved
1970s-2000: Facility Usage Gyms Development
of Fitness Industry
2001-2006: Hayday of Personal Training
2007-2010: Outdoor Bootcamps/Group Training
2011-2015: Indoor Group Training/ “Boxes”
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 28 of 268 --

The Fitness Industry Has Evolved
1970s-2000: Facility Usage Gyms Development
of Fitness Industry
2001-2006: Hayday of Personal Training
2007-2010: Outdoor Bootcamps/Group Training
2011-2015: Indoor Group Training/ “Boxes”
2015-Present: “Transformation Center”
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

of Fitness Industry

THE PROBLEM: Fitness facilities are selling
BURGERS...and wondering why they aren’t
making more PROFIT...when the profit is in
the FRIES & COKE.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

McDonalds for Fries & a Coke...but when
they offer it, 90% of people take it.

to maximize customer value.

Gym Launch
Supps
The App
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 60 of 268 --

As a result, Gym Launch has diverted 100% of
its profit towards building this future gym model,
and the systems to support it.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 61 of 268 --

Which means, we are essentially using the dues
we get from legacy & launch, to build the future
of what you all will use to dominate the next
decade.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 126 of 268 --

The Five Horsemen of Retention
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 127 of 268 --

The Five Horsemen of Retention
1) Wednesday Reach Out For Non-Attendance→
● Helps people stay on track before their
momentum disappears.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 128 of 268 --

The Five Horsemen of Retention
1) Wednesday Reach Out For Non-Attendance→
● Helps people stay on track before their
momentum disappears.
● Aka “get back on the horse” AFAP.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 129 of 268 --

The Five Horsemen of Retention
1) Wednesday Reach Out For Non-Attendance→
● Helps people stay on track before their
momentum disappears.
● Aka “get back on the horse” AFAP.
● So a missed workout doesn’t become a
missed month...resulting in a
cancellation/another #gainback
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 130 of 268 --

The Five Horsemen of Retention
2) 14 Day Comm Cycle For ALL Clients→
● Shows that you care about the person
OUTSIDE of fitness.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 131 of 268 --

The Five Horsemen of Retention
2) 14 Day Comm Cycle For ALL Clients→
● Shows that you care about the person
OUTSIDE of fitness.
● It’s a LOT harder to quit a RELATIONship than
it is a MEMBERship.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 132 of 268 --

The Five Horsemen of Retention
2) 14 Day Comm Cycle For ALL Clients→
● Shows that you care about the person
OUTSIDE of fitness.
● It’s a LOT harder to quit a RELATIONship than
it is a MEMBERship.
● Communication = Affinity
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 133 of 268 --

The Five Horsemen of Retention
3) Handwritten card→
● Shows they are valuable enough to pay
attention to.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 134 of 268 --

The Five Horsemen of Retention
3) Handwritten card→
● Shows they are valuable enough to pay
attention to.
● Reinforces the story of how much you care.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 135 of 268 --

The Five Horsemen of Retention
4) Monthly Member Events→
● Engages them in the community and meeting
OTHER members (most people are lonely &
bored)--fb, netflix, etc.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 136 of 268 --

The Five Horsemen of Retention
4) Monthly Member Events→
● Engages them in the community and meeting
OTHER members (most people are lonely &
bored)--fb, netflix, etc.
● Allows you to build relationships, know
names, outside life info
●
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 137 of 268 --

The Five Horsemen of Retention
4) Monthly Member Events→
● Engages them in the community and meeting
OTHER members (most people are lonely &
bored)--fb, netflix, etc.
● Allows you to build relationships, know
names, outside life info
● Allows them to see you as a HUMAN
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 138 of 268 --

The Five Horsemen of Retention
4) Monthly Member Events→
● Engages them in the community and meeting
OTHER members (most people are lonely &
bored)--fb, netflix, etc.
● Allows you to build relationships, know
names, outside life info
● Allows them to see you as a HUMAN
● Meet their friends/coworkers/family
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 139 of 268 --

The Five Horsemen of Retention
5) Exit Interviews→
● Shows you care about what they have to say
(and gain insight from a failure)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 140 of 268 --

The Five Horsemen of Retention
5) Exit Interviews→
● Shows you care about what they have to say
(and gain insight from a failure)
● Save them from making poor decision
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 141 of 268 --

The Five Horsemen of Retention
5) Exit Interviews→
● Shows you care about what they have to say
(and gain insight from a failure)
● Save them from making poor decision
● Let’s them vent. Allows you to apologize &
make good.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 142 of 268 --

So the result of all this is people who sign up for
FITNESS...but GET:
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
